scads 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Quick Tutorial on scads

    scads: A function for using scATAC-seq data and GWAS sumstats to calculate disease cell score

    scads.Rd

    scads: A function for using scATAC-seq data and GWAS sumstats to calculate disease cell score

    scads(
  count_matrix,
  nTopics = 10,
  bed_dir,
  sumstats_dir,
  gwas_nsamps,
  gwas_trait,
  outdir,
  ...
)

    Arguments

    count_matrix

    A peak-by-cell count matrix.

    nTopics

    The number of topics (clusters) to fit. Default is 10.

    bed_dir
    ...

    Additional arguments passed to internal functions.

    Value

    A list containing the fitted topic model, enrichment results, and cell scores.

    Examples

    result <- scads(count_matrix, GWAS_ss, LD_reference, nTopics = 15)
#> Error in scads(count_matrix, GWAS_ss, LD_reference, nTopics = 15): argument "outdir" is missing, with no default
